title: Venture Capital Trusts: 2025
body: "Venture Capital Trusts (VCTs) are one of the three tax-based venture capital schemes.  Table 1 provides statistics on the number of VCTs and amount of funds raised, and includes the first officially published estimates for tax year 2023 to 2024.  Table 2a and 2b includes statistics on the number of investors claiming Income Tax relief on their VCT investments and amounts invested, and includes the first estimates for tax year 2023 to 2024.  "
